description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI build that runs on push, pull request, and release creation events. Use a matrix job strategy to build on multiple platforms including Windows (MSVC 64-bit, MSVC 32-bit, MinGW), Ubuntu (18.04, 20.04), and Mac OS (Latest x86_64, Latest arm64). For each platform, check out the repository, perform a shallow fetch, and then build using CMake with varying generators and architectures.
